rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when bounds are concrete or visible.
Use visible identifiers and named constants in AGREE contracts for type and range assumptions.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex blocks use valid AADL scoping rules for component types and implementations.
Formulate guarantees using boolean expressions that match the actual types of the values involved.
Declare helper variables with explicit types to avoid type mismatch errors in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq` for defining boolean helper variables in AGREE contracts.
Wrap AGREE annex content in `annex agree { ... };` block syntax.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type contracts.
Do not reference subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
